task_completion.description: Create an RfQ Topic named 'Spring Furniture Restock'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the iDempiere 'RfQ Topic' window showing a saved record with the Name field set to 'Spring Furniture Restock'.

task_completion.description: Create a new RfQ document linked to the created topic
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'RfQ' window showing a new Request for Quotation record where the 'RfQ Topic' field is set to 'Spring Furniture Restock'.

task_completion.description: Set the RfQ document description to 'Quote for Patio Chairs'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Description' field in the main RfQ document header containing the exact text 'Quote for Patio Chairs'.

task_completion.description: Add an RfQ Line for the product 'Patio Chair'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'RfQ Line' tab within the RfQ document showing a line item where the Product field is set to 'Patio Chair'.

task_completion.description: Set the quantity of the RfQ Line to 20
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the quantity field (e.g., 'Quantity' or 'Qty') on the 'Patio Chair' RfQ Line set to the value '20'.

task_completion.description: Add 'Seed Farm Inc.' and 'C&W Construction' as subscribers
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Subscriber' or 'Vendor' tab within the RfQ document showing at least two records: one for 'Seed Farm Inc.' and one for 'C&W Construction'.
Look for the Document Status field in the RfQ header showing 'Completed', or evidence of the 'Document Action' button being used to Complete the document.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the iDempiere web GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the iDempiere web interface in a browser. The agent must not use terminal commands, direct SQL database inserts, or API calls to create the records.

integrity.description: Verify data was entered into actual application fields
integrity.visual_evidence: The text 'Spring Furniture Restock', 'Quote for Patio Chairs', etc., must be entered into the corresponding iDempiere form fields, not written in a separate text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Verify the document is genuinely saved and completed in the system
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard iDempiere UI indicators of saved records, such as the status bar showing 'Saved' or the Document Status updating to 'Completed', rather than just typed text in unsaved fields.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a new RfQ Topic exactly named 'Spring Furniture Restock'. The RfQ document must have the description 'Quote for Patio Chairs'. The RfQ Line must use the pre-existing product 'Patio Chair' with a quantity of exactly 20. The RfQ must have at least 2 subscribers, specifically including the pre-existing business partners 'Seed Farm Inc.' and 'C&W Construction'. The final RfQ document must be processed to a 'Completed' status.
